calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Continued To Jan-05-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Dowling.

Dana Andreoli, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff(s) First American title Insurance Company.
Plaintiff's Witness Meredith Barnes was swon and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Elaine Diane Stathakis for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $200,120.16
Prejudgment Interest - $49,950.13
Attorney Fees - $18,292.50
Costs - $549.00
Total judgment in the amount of $268,911.79

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
